name: getFoundryCampaignCrawler
description: Builds a Foundry campaign navigation tree markdown file by invoking the existing Jenny /api runtime and the foundry-journal specialist. Use this when the campaign is too large for direct journal reasoning and you need a persistent MD tree with folder hierarchy, short summaries, direct journal refs, and page refs.

outputPath.description: Target markdown path to write, for example dm-notebook/status/foundry-campaign-tree.md.

query.description: Optional focus hint, such as the current chapter, location, or campaign name.

channelKey.description: Optional Foundry bridge channel key. Defaults to toolsconfig.getFoundryBridge.channelKey.

rebuild.description: If true or omitted, rebuild the whole file from scratch. Set false only if you explicitly want a conservative update.
